learning_objectives: Learn 10 common daily routine verbs (wake up, eat, go, come, work, sleep, brush, wash, drink, read).
Use present simple positive with I.
Talk about what you do every day.
Use time expressions: in the morning, in the afternoon, at night, every day.

questions.prompt_en: Every morning, I ___ up at 6 o'clock.
questions.prompt_ar: كل صباح، أنا ___ من النوم الساعة السادسة.
questions.explanation_en: With 'I' in present simple, we use the base form of the verb: I wake up.
questions.explanation_ar: مع 'I' في المضارع البسيط نستخدم الفعل الأساسي: I wake up.

questions.explanation_en: Present simple with 'I': I eat. No 's' after the verb with I.
questions.explanation_ar: المضارع البسيط مع 'I': I eat. لا نضيف 's' مع I.
hints: I eat / I drink / I sleep (بدون s)

questions.explanation_en: We say 'at night' (not 'in night'). But: in the morning, in the afternoon.
questions.explanation_ar: نقول 'at night' وليس 'in night'. لكن: in the morning, in the afternoon.

questions.prompt_en: Which sentence describes a morning routine correctly?
questions.prompt_ar: أي جملة تصف روتين الصباح بشكل صحيح؟
choices: I wake up and brush my teeth.
I wake up and brushes my teeth.
I wakes up and brush my teeth.
I waking up and brush my teeth.
questions.correct_answer: I wake up and brush my teeth.
questions.explanation_en: With 'I', all verbs stay in base form: wake, brush (no -s, no -ing).
questions.explanation_ar: مع 'I' نستخدم الفعل الأساسي دائماً: wake, brush (بدون s أو ing).
hints: لا تضف s أو ing مع I

questions.explanation_en: Present simple with 'I': I go. Use base form with I.
questions.explanation_ar: المضارع البسيط مع 'I': I go. نستخدم الفعل الأساسي مع I.
hints: I go (وليس I goes أو I going)
